name: reasoningbank-with-agentdb
description: Implement ReasoningBank adaptive learning with AgentDB's 150x faster vector database. Includes trajectory tracking, verdict judgment, memory distillation, and pattern recognition. Use when building self-learning agents, optimizing decision-making, or implementing experience replay systems.
capabilities: Initialize and configure ReasoningBank with AgentDB backend for adaptive learning
Track agent execution trajectories and judge outcomes for experience replay
Store and retrieve experiences using vector embeddings with 150x faster search
Distill similar experiences into consolidated patterns for improved decision-making
Integrate with reasoning modules: PatternMatcher, ContextSynthesizer, MemoryOptimizer, and ExperienceCurator
author: DNYoussef
securitySummary: Static scanner flagged documentation patterns as security issues. All findings are false positives: network references are metadata/documentation links, filesystem references are database path mentions, external_command patterns are Markdown code block delimiters, and cryptographic algorithm detections are substring matches in words like 'memory'. The skill is a legitimate machine learning documentation file with no executable code.
valueStatement: Building self-learning agents requires tracking experiences and improving decision-making over time. This skill provides ReasoningBank adaptive learning patterns using AgentDB's high-performance vector database for 150x faster pattern retrieval and memory management.
userTitle: Implement Adaptive Learning with ReasoningBank and AgentDB
limitations: Requires AgentDB v1.0.7 or higher for full functionality
Does not include built-in reinforcement learning algorithms for policy updates
Memory patterns must be manually validated for quality and relevance
Performance gains depend on proper database dimension configuration (default 1536)

useCases.targetUser: AI Engineers Building Customer Service Automation
useCases.title: Build Self-Learning Customer Support Agents
useCases.description: Create agents that learn from support interactions. Track successful resolution patterns, retrieve similar past solutions, and improve response quality over time using vector similarity search.

useCases.targetUser: ML Engineers Working on Autonomous Coding Agents
useCases.title: Implement Experience Replay for Code Optimization
useCases.description: Enable coding agents to learn from optimization successes. Store trajectory patterns of performance improvements and retrieve similar patterns when encountering new optimization challenges.

useCases.title: Create Adaptive Debugging Assistants
useCases.description: Build debugging tools that learn from fix patterns. Track bug categories, successful fix approaches, and success rates to provide increasingly accurate debugging recommendations.

promptTemplates.title: Initialize ReasoningBank Database
promptTemplates.prompt: Initialize ReasoningBank with AgentDB for adaptive learning. Set up the database at '.agentdb/reasoningbank.db' with dimension 1536. Enable learning plugins and reasoning agents with a cache size of 1000 patterns.

promptTemplates.title: Store Successful Experience
promptTemplates.prompt: Record a successful agent experience in ReasoningBank. The experience involves: task='optimize-api-endpoint', approach='added eager loading and caching', outcome='success', latency_reduction=0.85. Use domain 'api-optimization' and confidence 0.95.

promptTemplates.title: Retrieve Similar Past Experiences
promptTemplates.prompt: Find similar past experiences for optimizing database queries. Retrieve 5 experiences using MMR for diversity. Enable context synthesis to generate a rich narrative of successful approaches.

promptTemplates.title: Distill Consolidated Patterns
promptTemplates.prompt: Consolidate 100 experiences in the 'api-optimization' domain into high-level patterns. Distill into general principles with success rates and confidence scores. Store the distilled patterns for future retrieval.

bestPractices: Use domain filtering to scope pattern retrieval to relevant areas and improve relevance scores
Enable context synthesis for complex decisions to generate coherent recommendations
Configure appropriate cache sizes based on expected pattern volume for optimal performance
antiPatterns: Storing low-confidence experiences without validation can degrade retrieval quality over time
Disabling automatic memory optimization causes database growth and slower searches
Using generic domains without organization reduces pattern relevance and usefulness

faq.question: What is the difference between ReasoningBank and AgentDB?
faq.answer: ReasoningBank provides the adaptive learning patterns and concepts like trajectory tracking, verdict judgment, and memory distillation. AgentDB is the high-performance vector database backend that stores and retrieves these patterns with 150x faster search speeds.

faq.question: How does trajectory tracking work?
faq.answer: Trajectory tracking records sequences of agent actions and their outcomes. Each step includes the action taken and its result. The complete trajectory is stored with an embedding for similarity-based retrieval of successful patterns.

faq.question: What is memory distillation?
faq.answer: Memory distillation consolidates similar experiences into high-level patterns. It analyzes multiple concrete experiences, extracts common approaches, and stores abstracted patterns with aggregated success rates and confidence scores.

faq.question: Can I migrate from legacy ReasoningBank?
faq.answer: Yes, AgentDB provides a migration tool. Use 'npx agentdb@latest migrate --source .swarm/memory.db' to import legacy data. The migration includes validation and automatic compatibility adjustments.

faq.question: How do I choose the right embedding dimension?
faq.answer: The default dimension of 1536 works well for most use cases. Higher dimensions capture more nuance but require more storage. Lower dimensions are faster but may lose detail. Adjust based on your pattern complexity and performance needs.

faq.question: What are the reasoning modules?
faq.answer: AgentDB includes PatternMatcher for finding similar patterns, ContextSynthesizer for generating rich context, MemoryOptimizer for consolidation, and ExperienceCurator for quality filtering. These can be combined for sophisticated reasoning workflows.
